name: BeNext-Yumeshin Group Co.
summary: BeNext-Yumeshin Group Co. engages in engineer dispatching, subcontracting, outsourcing, and recruiting business for the technology and manufacturing fields in Japan and internationally. It is also involved in the development of automotive software; and dispatching, placement, and introduction of personnel. In addition, the company offers employment for disabled people. The company was formerly known as BeNEXT Group Inc. and changed its name to BeNext-Yumeshin Group Co. in April 2021. BeNext-Yumeshin Group Co. was founded in 1959 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
